name: ShaMaran Petroleum Corp.
summary: ShaMaran Petroleum Corp., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the exploration and development of oil and gas. The company holds 27.6% interest in the Atrush Block production sharing contract, which covers an area of 269 square kilometers located in the Kurdistan region of Iraq. It also provides technical and administration services. The company was formerly known as Bayou Bend Petroleum Ltd. and changed its name to ShaMaran Petroleum Corp. in October 2009. ShaMaran Petroleum Corp. was incorporated in 1991 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
